_comment: Context knobs template (SPEC_CONTEXT_POLICY). Merge context_policy and/or pointerize_policy into agent.json — do not replace the whole file. All fields optional: omit any key to keep code defaults (bit-identical). Defaults below mirror current hardcodes for copy-paste clarity.
_debug: DEBUG_TOKEN_CAL=1 logs EWMA raw/actual/sample/scale per LLM turn

context_policy._budget_note: Layer percentages are independent caps (need not sum to 1). total context size still comes from model map / MAX_CONTEXT_TOKENS.

heavy_compression._note: Relative to usable = total * (1 - system_pct). first then repeat (hysteresis).

protect._note: Prune/compact skip window uses raw estimateTokens (not calibrator scale).

token_calibrator._note: EWMA: scale ← α·(prompt_tokens/local_est) + (1-α)·scale; clamped. Runtime still learns scale per session.

pointerize_policy._note: Keep separate from context_policy (SPEC_POINTERIZE_SCOPE). soft_force_ratio uses calibrated estimates when available.

_profiles._note: Not loaded automatically — copy a block into agent.json context_policy when experimenting.
